reviews.review_description: Hi owner I wanna be I mod I see so many toxic players in game saying you suck you trash I wanna be helpful my Nick name is qwa

Pretty good for a new game, even if the map doesn't have as many trees or other objects, (But like I said it's a new game). The movement feels nice, but can be a bit glitchy when trying to run by moving your hands back and forth quickly. The wall climbing/running feels nice. The lighting is nice, not much I really have to say about it. The textures are simple, but beautiful. And it works greatly with the game style and design. What I suggest: Adding more trees to climb, possibly more slides, like smaller slides that you'd find at a playground. Also, I like the idea of simply touching someone with the kick hammer to kick them from the game, but I accidentally got kicked by a moderator when I first joined. So I suggest you add a feature where you have to add a little more force to kick them, not too much, just to reduce the risk of accidents. (If that is possible with the engine you use), but hey, if you want to talk more hit me up! My discord is sodacat_

developer_response.body: Hi! thanks for the suggestions! i will be sure to add them!
